svg.title: Actual packed cable bundle cross-sections leaving one rack
svg.desc: Code-generated engineering diagram comparing exact cable counts packed on a common physical scale.
svg.text: Actual packed cable bundle cross-sections leaving one rack
9072 total fibers per rack, 200G per fiber; every dot is one physical cable
All six drawings use the same physical scale
Thin gray circle = equivalent raw-area OD. Dashed circle = actual packed OD from drawn layout.
Counts are exact; excludes routing, bend radius, connectors, fanout, and slack.
